services.title: GSM Network Optimization
services.description: This division conducts Drive Test to confirm GSM network coverage for our client using TEMS Investigation tool and advice accordingly. We supply and conduct training on the TEMS investigation tools as well.
details: Installation & commissioning of GSM base stations, GSM antennas, and base station upgrades
Supply and installation of DC and AC power boards, change over units, generators, and GSM sites power upgrades
Installation and commissioning of WIMAX base stations, CPEs, configuration of all associated routers, and maintenance of the data network

services.title: GSM Sites Roll Out
services.description: Broadband manages turnkey projects right from site acquisition, multi skills surveys and design, site build/construction, network design, installation, configuration & commissioning of GSM network.
details: Site Acquisition: We negotiate for site lease and all site access logistics. We acquire site built approvals from local authorities and seek environmental site built approvals on behalf of our customers.

services.title: Tower Rigging
services.description: Providing professional tower rigging services for safe and efficient deployment of telecom towers.

services.title: Civil Works
services.description: We carry out comprehensive civil works including site preparation, construction, and infrastructure development:
details: Casting of communication tower foundation & tower erection, equipment shelter assembly, building perimeter fence as required by clients, manhole and all associated ducting’s.
GSM base stations installation and commissioning.

services.title: RF Networks
services.description: Having a mobile network meeting all customers’ requirements is a big challenge. This is because the topology of the earth is very irregular. Buildings, tunnels, hills and valleys complicate Optimization of RF planning. In this regards, we have on board RF repeater solutions operating in all mobile technologies. Our partner in these solutions is REMOTEK who are ISO certified to design and manufacture these solutions.
details: The offering include; GSM, UMTS, CDMA, UCDMA, Multi-band, Fiber optic repeaters, Cable boaster (Line amplifier) etc.
Detailed microwave radio network planning for both point to point transmission and point to multipoint access systems.
Installation and commissioning of various radio systems ranging from VHF, UHF, PDH to SDH.

services.title: VSAT Installation
services.description: Expert VSAT installation services for reliable satellite communication, ensuring seamless connectivity in remote and underserved areas.
details: Comprehensive site survey and planning to determine optimal VSAT placement
Professional installation and configuration of VSAT equipment for maximum performance
Ongoing maintenance and support services to ensure continuous and reliable operation

services.title: Intelligent Transport Networks
services.description: High-speed, scalable transport networks powered by cutting-edge optical and photonic technology.

services.title: Generators
services.description: Providing reliable backup power solutions through advanced generator systems.
